'''gachafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:sib|sib]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-ch-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:sib|sib]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gachafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæchæfæth|gæchæfæth]] || [[word:gæchæfæj|gæchæfæj]] || [[word:gæchæfæsh|gæchæfæsh]] || [[word:gæchæfæ|gæchæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gachachafath|gachachafath]] || [[word:gachachafaj|gachachafaj]] || [[word:gachachafash|gachachafash]] || [[word:gachachafa|gachachafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gachafath|gachafath]] || [[word:gachafaj|gachafaj]] || [[word:gachafash|gachafash]] || [[word:gachafa|gachafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gachaffafth|gachaffafth]] || [[word:gachaffafj|gachaffafj]] || [[word:gachaffafsh|gachaffafsh]] || [[word:gachaffaf|gachaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gachafatha|gachafatha]] || [[word:gachafaja|gachafaja]] || [[word:gachafasha|gachafasha]] || [[word:gachafaka|gachafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gachafath|gachafath]] || [[word:gachafaj|gachafaj]] || [[word:gachafash|gachafash]] || [[word:gachafa|gachafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gachafathal|gachafathal]] || [[word:gachafajal|gachafajal]] || [[word:gachafashal|gachafashal]] || [[word:gachafakal|gachafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gachafaathatha|gachafaathatha]] || [[word:gachafaajaja|gachafaajaja]] || [[word:gachafaashasha|gachafaashasha]] || [[word:gachafaaka|gachafaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gachafathan|gachafathan]] || [[word:gachafajan|gachafajan]] || [[word:gachafashan|gachafashan]] || [[word:gachafakan|gachafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gachafathaoro|gachafathaoro]] || [[word:gachafajaoro|gachafajaoro]] || [[word:gachafashaoro|gachafashaoro]] || [[word:gachafakaoro|gachafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
